title: Destiny 2: Minecraft Edition
body:
# _Become Legend (by default) TODAY!!!_

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/hP7Q0I6FU4Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


_**WE NEED GUARDIANS, AND WE NEED YOU!!!**_

Destiny 2 Minecraft Edition is a fun, satirical take on the real game within the confines of vanilla Minecraft! Play through many familiar locations from the vanilla instance of Destiny 2 (otherwise known as the Red War), fit with all sorts of new secrets, features, and enemy combatants from later expansions to not only provide a fun nostalgic experience but also to add its own spin on it for a fresh experience without needing any mods to play (although a pack is available)!


### Available Features (As of 5/26/26)

- 7 Strikes (With a daily rotating playlist
- 5 Horde mode activities
- 35+ Exotics
- 200+ Guns
- Fully custom enemies pulled from the real game
- 4 Explorable planets from D2 Vanilla, drown in nostalgia, or get mesmerized by what you missed out on years ago.
- Surprisingly complex, yet easy to pick up build crafting.
- Wonderfully stupid Minecraft jank that makes you want to pull your hair out

[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/j8dp4MQK7c)




_Server is completely EULA compliant._

_D2MC is not affiliated with Mojang Studios, Microsoft, or Bungie._
